calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing, and having been continued from Monday, June 7, 2010. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation.
No appearance by defendant James H. Bliesner.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 11, 2010.
Declaration of Peggy A. Trotman in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed June 7, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 7, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corporation, and against defendant James H. Bliesner as follows:

Principal - $8,174.25.
Interest - $1,719.95.
Attorney Fees - $1,150.00.
Costs - $263.00.

Total - $11,307.20.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Continued To Jun-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Set For Trial On Jun-07-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
